'''ngawazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyathaspid|cyathaspid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-w-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyathaspid|cyathaspid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngawazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæwæzhæth|ngæwæzhæth]] || [[word:ngæwæzhæj|ngæwæzhæj]] || [[word:ngæwæzhæsh|ngæwæzhæsh]] || [[word:ngæwæzhæ|ngæwæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngawawazhath|ngawawazhath]] || [[word:ngawawazhaj|ngawawazhaj]] || [[word:ngawawazhash|ngawawazhash]] || [[word:ngawawazha|ngawawazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngawazhath|ngawazhath]] || [[word:ngawazhaj|ngawazhaj]] || [[word:ngawazhash|ngawazhash]] || [[word:ngawazha|ngawazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngawafzhath|ngawafzhath]] || [[word:ngawafzhaj|ngawafzhaj]] || [[word:ngawafzhash|ngawafzhash]] || [[word:ngawafzhaf|ngawafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngawazhatha|ngawazhatha]] || [[word:ngawazhaja|ngawazhaja]] || [[word:ngawazhasha|ngawazhasha]] || [[word:ngawazhaka|ngawazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngawazhath|ngawazhath]] || [[word:ngawazhaj|ngawazhaj]] || [[word:ngawazhash|ngawazhash]] || [[word:ngawazha|ngawazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngawazhathal|ngawazhathal]] || [[word:ngawazhajal|ngawazhajal]] || [[word:ngawazhashal|ngawazhashal]] || [[word:ngawazhakal|ngawazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngawazhathatha|ngawazhathatha]] || [[word:ngawazhajaja|ngawazhajaja]] || [[word:ngawazhashasha|ngawazhashasha]] || [[word:ngawazhaka|ngawazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngawazhathan|ngawazhathan]] || [[word:ngawazhajan|ngawazhajan]] || [[word:ngawazhashan|ngawazhashan]] || [[word:ngawazhakan|ngawazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngawazhathaoro|ngawazhathaoro]] || [[word:ngawazhajaoro|ngawazhajaoro]] || [[word:ngawazhashaoro|ngawazhashaoro]] || [[word:ngawazhakaoro|ngawazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
